title: Mexico and the United Kingdom hold the Second Multilateral and Human Rights Dialogue: Joint Statement 2025
body: "On 14 May 2025, representatives of the governments of the United Kingdom and Mexico held the Second Multilateral and Human Rights Dialogue, as a follow-up to the first meeting of 16 January 2024. The British delegation was led by the Director of Multilateral Affairs and Human Rights at the Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office, Freya Jackson; accompanied by the UK Ambassador to Mexico, Susannah Goshko and British Embassy and FCDO representatives.  Both parties welcomed the opportunity to renew discussions on multilateral and human rights issues following the changes in government in both countries. The talks provided a space to elaborate the priorities of the respective governments and identify areas of mutual collaboration and concern. "
